title: Ship AI platform acquisition surfaces and renewal-review content
summary: Records release evidence for the new AI-platform landing page, the Portkey comparison page for AI platform teams, and the renewal-review blog that ties customer usage and release history into control-plane operations.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the new AI-platform landing page, Portkey comparison page, homepage discovery links, and renewal-review blog route all render from the production build and remain in the public release-history pipeline.
Confirms the AI-platform acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcements and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the AI-platform landing page, Portkey comparison entry, renewal-review blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
